issue: Residents lose heat, elevators, and refrigeration during outages.
action: Install a neighborhood microgrid with solar, batteries, and backup connections for public housing buildings.
source_note: Inspired by coastal recovery planning examples in the course materials.

issue: Shelter operations fail when ground-floor equipment floods.
action: Elevate electrical systems and retrofit the community center so it can operate as a storm shelter.
source_note: Inspired by neighborhood resilience hub concepts in the course materials.

issue: Repeated storm surge damages oceanfront access and weakens shoreline protection.
action: Expand dune restoration, reinforce the boardwalk, and add sand retention features.
source_note: Inspired by shoreline recovery strategies in the course materials.

issue: Rail and bus access is disrupted by surge water entering stations and access points.
action: Install removable flood barriers and pump upgrades at transit entrances.
source_note: Inspired by transit resilience examples in the course materials.

issue: Underground transit assets flood through vents and stairways during major storms.
action: Add deployable flood gates, raised vents, and monitoring sensors at key subway openings.
source_note: Inspired by Lower Manhattan recovery planning themes.

issue: Road access can be cut off during severe flooding.
action: Designate and equip a ferry staging area for emergency passenger and supply transport.
source_note: Inspired by coastal access planning examples in the course materials.

project_title: Backup Power for Medical Needs Registry
issue: People with medical devices face high risk when power fails.
action: Create a registry-linked backup power and charging program for medically vulnerable residents.
source_note: Inspired by public health preparedness strategies in the course materials.

issue: Street flooding persists because drainage systems are undersized and clogged.
action: Upgrade storm drains, add backflow prevention, and prioritize repetitive flood blocks.
source_note: Inspired by drainage upgrade strategies in the course materials.

issue: Hard shoreline edges increase wave impact and erosion.
action: Restore wetlands and living shorelines to reduce surge energy before it reaches homes.
source_note: Inspired by natural infrastructure strategies in the course materials.

issue: Heat waves and blackouts leave residents without safe indoor space.
action: Convert libraries and schools into resilience hubs with cooling, Wi-Fi, and backup power.
source_note: Inspired by resilience hub planning examples in the course materials.

issue: Residents lose access to primary care and medications after disasters.
action: Pre-stage mobile clinic contracts and pharmacy support for post-storm deployment.
source_note: Inspired by continuity-of-care strategies in the course materials.

issue: Small businesses reopen slowly after flood damage and long utility outages.
action: Offer rapid micro-grants for cleanup, replacement equipment, and continuity planning.
source_note: Inspired by local recovery financing strategies in the course materials.
